title: Why did Clavicular break up with Lily Snyder? Streamer's shocking split leaves viewers stunned
summary_full: Streamer Clavicular confirmed his breakup with Lily Snyder during a live broadcast.  He cited manipulative and volatile behavior as reasons for the split.  An incident involving his ear surgery recovery also contributed to the decision.  The streamer mentioned ongoing conflicts with his content creation style.  Their relationship had previously faced numerous difficulties and near-breakups.
